post_deploy: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates gnupg git && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
yes '' | ollama launch openclaw --config -y --model gemma4:e2b 2>&1 | tail -n 40
command -v openclaw >/dev/null || { echo 'openclaw binary missing after ollama launch — install silently failed'; exit 1; }; echo openclaw-installed: $(which openclaw)
setsid nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & sleep 5 && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18789/__openclaw__/canvas/ > /dev/null && echo openclaw gateway up
